codeReview.summary: Current HEAD matches the feature handoff: Zod validation failures now use the shared `{ error, message }` 400 envelope, invalid-parameter coverage spans the stated representative families, and the compatibility audit documents the full active matrix plus removed NFT context.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The compatibility audit intentionally tracks 83 parity-matrix rows because it includes 7 NFT endpoints as removed-roadmap context, while the active implemented surface is 76 non-NFT endpoints. This nuance is easy to misread from the feature text alone.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: docs/status/compatibility-audit.md:5-9 states '83 table entries' and '76 / 76 matrix endpoints outside the removed NFT family'; the feature description in features.json refers to 'all 76 matrix endpoints'.

summary: Pass. Reviewed both worker-session handoffs and the feature commit on current HEAD. The implementation satisfies the feature requirements without current-head defects; only a shared-state note remains about the audit's 83-row vs 76-active-endpoint accounting.
